heading: Approval of applications
label: 3987 Approval of applications
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “part” for “subchapter”.Pub. L. 100–4181985— substituted “Secretary” for “Foundation” in pars. (1) and (2) of subsec. (a) and in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 99–159
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “part” for “subchapter”.Pub. L. 100–4181985— substituted “Secretary” for “Foundation” in pars. (1) and (2) of subsec. (a) and in subsec. (b).Pub. L. 99–159

children.heading: Criteria; consistency of applications with State plans
children.label: a Criteria; consistency of applications with State plans

children.text: The Secretary shall establish criteria for approval of applications under this part.

No application may be approved by the Secretary unless the State educational agency or the State agency for higher education, as the case may be, determines that the application is consistent with State plans for elementary and secondary education or State plans for higher education, as the case may be, in the State.

children.heading: Procedures for equitable distribution of grants among States
children.label: b Procedures for equitable distribution of grants among States
children.text: The Secretary shall adopt approval procedures designed to assure that there is equitable distribution of grants among the States.
